sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93187" key="sa/mac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σάμαξ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n93187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rush-mat</tr_>, used as a bed in war, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0431.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chionid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>; also, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τοξικὸς κάλαμος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0472.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lysipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
